commit.Message: chore(git): merge api-18 tracking and data fixes
commit.Body:
Merges upstream api-18 fixes including:
- Creator/notifier tracking persistence fixes (notifier restored on
  block entity load, serialization efficiency, UUID cleanup asymmetry)
- Villager profession/type data provider fixes
- INameable data provider additions
- Player interact phase improvements
- Inventory slot adapter and shared inventory fixes
- LibraryManager and ListenerClassVisitor updates

Conflict resolution: ServerLevelDataMixin_API kept 26.1 world clocks
implementation for dayTime/setDayTime, dropped api-18's synchronizeTime
approach. Removed synchronizeTime @Invoker from MinecraftServerAccessor
as the method no longer exists in 26.1.

Signed-off-by: Gabriel Harris-Rouquette <gabizou@me.com>
